recommendations.title: Odd Man Out
recommendations.overview: Belfast police conduct a door-to-door manhunt for an IRA gunman wounded in a daring robbery.

recommendations.title: The Fallen Idol
recommendations.overview: Phillipe, the son of an ambassador in London, hero-worships his father's butler Baines. His perception of the man changes when he accidentally discovers the secret that Baines keeps and witnesses the consequences that adults' lies can cause.

recommendations.title: The Third Man
recommendations.overview: In postwar Vienna, Austria, Holly Martins, a writer of pulp Westerns, arrives penniless as a guest of his childhood chum Harry Lime, only to learn he has died. Martins develops a conspiracy theory after learning of a "third man" present at the time o

recommendations.title: Scrooge
recommendations.overview: A musical adaptation of Charles Dickens' classic ghost tale starring Albert Finney.

recommendations.title: Our Man in Havana

recommendations.title: The Agony and the Ecstasy

recommendations.title: The Muppet Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: A retelling of the classic Dickens tale of Ebenezer Scrooge, miser extraordinaire. He is held accountable for his dastardly ways during night-time visitations by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

recommendations.title: Mickey's Christmas Carol

recommendations.title: Oliver Twist

recommendations.title: Call Me by Your Name
